evals.prompt: Show me all my active issues
evals.expected_output: A formatted list of active issues assigned to the current user, grouped by project, each showing parent ID (or dash), issue ID, title, status, and reporter. Includes a date header.

assertions.name: renders-as-list
assertions.description: Response contains markdown list items (lines starting with '- [')

assertions.name: has-date-header
assertions.description: Response contains the 'My Active Issues' header with a date

assertions.name: issue-ids-in-bold
assertions.description: Each list item contains an issue key in bold (e.g. **PROJ-42**)

assertions.name: status-shown
assertions.description: Each list item includes a status wrapped in underscores (e.g. _In Progress_)

assertions.name: parent-column-present
assertions.description: Each list item starts with a bracketed parent ID or dash (e.g. [PROJ-10] or [—])

assertions.name: grouped-by-project
assertions.description: If multiple projects exist, output has ### project group headers

assertions.name: reporter-included
assertions.description: Each list item includes a reporter / creator name

assertions.name: no-intermediate-narration
assertions.description: No process narration like 'I will now fetch...' before the list

evals.prompt: What's on my plate right now? I'm trying to figure out where to focus across all the boards I'm on.
evals.expected_output: A formatted list of active issues grouped by project with cross-board scope. If >20 issues, includes a count summary at the top.

assertions.name: renders-as-list
assertions.description: Response contains markdown list items (lines starting with '- [')

assertions.name: has-date-header
assertions.description: Response contains the 'My Active Issues' header with a date

assertions.name: issue-ids-in-bold
assertions.description: Each list item contains an issue key in bold

assertions.name: status-shown
assertions.description: Each list item includes a status wrapped in underscores

assertions.name: parent-column-present
assertions.description: Each list item starts with a bracketed parent ID or dash

assertions.name: cross-project-scope
assertions.description: If issues from multiple projects exist, all are shown (not filtered to single board)

assertions.name: no-intermediate-narration
assertions.description: No process narration before the list

evals.prompt: Quick status check — what am I currently assigned to?
evals.expected_output: A formatted summary of all active issues. Each issue shows parent ID (or dash), issue ID, title, workflow status, and reporter. Grouped by project.

assertions.name: renders-as-list
assertions.description: Response contains markdown list items (lines starting with '- [')

assertions.name: has-date-header
assertions.description: Response contains the 'My Active Issues' header with a date

assertions.name: issue-ids-in-bold
assertions.description: Each list item contains an issue key in bold

assertions.name: status-shown
assertions.description: Each list item includes a status wrapped in underscores

assertions.name: parent-column-present
assertions.description: Each list item starts with a bracketed parent ID or dash

assertions.name: reporter-included
assertions.description: Each list item includes a reporter / creator name

assertions.name: no-intermediate-narration
assertions.description: No process narration before the list
